summary: Documented accepted build-contract and efficiency sprint planning decisions, then created roadmap tasks for Build Contract v2, Efficiency Foundation, and Status/Graph/Diff Table UI.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/builds.md: builds become high-signal handoff contracts with mandatory feedback diff rows, implementation closure brief, explicit consumes/produces, and lifecycle update.
.codewiki/kb/system/compilers.md: feedback rows compile into builds and implementation builds include closure briefs.
.codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md: sprint cohorts, sprint contents, scoped agency inputs, and sprint checkpoint retention documented.
.codewiki/kb/system/agency.md: roadmap/sprint/task scopes, token/time/cost/session/write/risk budgets, and session-per-sprint policy gate documented.
.codewiki/kb/system/api.md: codewiki.diff_table capability and scoped agency gates documented.
.codewiki/kb/lexicon.md: diff table and closure brief terms added.
.codewiki/kb/product/uis/status-panel.md: board tab and success signals include diff-table decisions.
.codewiki/kb/product/uis/graph-navigation.md: graph navigation includes diff rows and sprint/task scoped slices.
roadmap_changes: TASK-055 created: Implement Build Contract v2 and closure briefs.
TASK-056 created: Plan Efficiency Foundation sprint.
TASK-057 created: Plan Status, Graph, and Diff Table UI sprint.
assumptions: Historical builds remain legacy/cold until a targeted migration is justified.
Sprint model tasks represent sprint cohorts until first-class sprint entities exist.
open_questions: Confirm Pi/harness session-spawn API before implementing automatic session-per-sprint spawning.
